description_long: This is a two-story corner pizzeria building with a red-brick facade and a flat roof, featuring a prominent fire escape on the side and a rooftop access structure. The ground floor has a black awning over the main entrance, with outdoor seating consisting of round tables and chairs on the sidewalk. Large windows and a mural add visual interest to the street-facing walls, while the side and rear of the building are simpler, with utility pipes, trash bins, and a secondary entrance. The roof includes a vent and a small structure, possibly for rooftop access or storage. Street elements such as lamp posts, a fire hydrant, and crosswalks surround the building, situating it in a lively urban environment.
description: A two-story red-brick pizzeria with outdoor seating, fire escape, mural, and urban street elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, black awning, outdoor tables, mural, and street corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fire escape, windows, trash bins, and rooftop details.
description_view_2: Rear view with utility pipes, trash bins, a secondary entrance, and a plain facade.
description_view_3: Alternate street-facing view with the white side building, additional outdoor seating, and lamp post.
